data.comment: Bomb Guardian - 160HP for the head - 52HP to stun the tail
2 charged dark shots to the tail, then 4 charged dark shots to the head: https://youtu.be/yaISvZXNLTw
Screw Attack the head during an attack animation, cannot stun the tail
Outside one very specific situation, you will always have access to the cannons upon reloading after the fight if you are up here.
